data.body:
I'm ambivalent.

In places where this would be most effective, like suburban Texas, the vast seas of concrete parking are never really going to be redeveloped into anything dense in our lifetimes.  So decentralized solar is a net positive.

But it is stupid in places like Seattle or Bay Area.
